title: Citrusy Mexican Rice Burrito
description: A light and flavorful Mexican dish featuring crispy rice, halal-friendly and perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Crispy Rice (Khao Khua)
ingredients.notes: dry-fry the rice in a pan until crispy, breaking it up with a spoon

instructions: Cook the crispy rice according to package instructions.
Cut the chicken breast into small pieces and marinate it in halal-friendly oil, lime juice, and orange juice for at least 30 minutes.
Heat a pan over medium heat and add the marinated chicken. Cook until browned and cooked through.
Melt a tablespoon of halal-friendly oil in a separate pan over medium heat and saut9 the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the crispy rice to the pan with the onion mixture and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the heavy cream and stir-fry until the rice is well-coated and the mixture is heated through.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Finely chop the cilantro and sprinkle it over the rice mixture.
Warm a large flour tortilla in the microwave for 20-30 seconds and fill it with the rice mixture.
